parameters.query:
SELECT 'ingresos' AS tipo, COALESCE(pm.name, 'Sin método') AS concepto,
  SUM(p.amount_applied) AS total, p.source_currency AS currency
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = p.payment_method_id
WHERE p.payment_date::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND p.is_sales = true AND p.status = 'completed'
  AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR p.source_currency = $3::varchar)
GROUP BY pm.name, p.source_currency

SELECT 'gastos' AS tipo, COALESCE(mc.name, 'Sin categoría') AS concepto,
  SUM(mt.amount) AS total, mt.currency
FROM miscellaneous_transactions mt
LEFT JOIN misc_transaction_categories mc ON mc.id = mt.category_id
WHERE mt.transaction_date::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND mt.is_sales = false
  AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR mt.currency = $3::varchar)
GROUP BY mc.name, mt.currency

SELECT
  -- Total cobrado
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_applied), 0)
   FROM payments p
   WHERE p.payment_date::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
     AND p.is_sales = true AND p.status = 'completed'
     AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR p.source_currency = $3::varchar)) AS total_cobrado,
  -- Nuevos pacientes
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u
   WHERE u.is_sales = true
     AND u.created_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date) AS nuevos_pacientes,
  -- Tasa retención (pacientes con >1 cita / total con cita)
  (SELECT ROUND(
    COUNT(CASE WHEN citas > 1 THEN 1 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1
   ) FROM (
    SELECT patient_id, COUNT(*) AS citas FROM appointments
    WHERE start_datetime::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date GROUP BY patient_id
   ) sub) AS tasa_retencion,
  -- Tasa ocupación agenda
  (SELECT ROUND(
    COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('completed','confirmed') THEN 1 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1
   ) FROM appointments
   WHERE start_datetime::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date) AS tasa_ocupacion,
  -- Ticket promedio
  (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(i.total), 0)
   FROM invoices i
   WHERE i.created_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
     AND i.is_sales = true
     AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR i.currency = $3::varchar)) AS ticket_promedio,
  -- Total gastos
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(mt.amount), 0)
   FROM miscellaneous_transactions mt
   WHERE mt.transaction_date::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
     AND mt.is_sales = false
     AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR mt.currency = $3::varchar)) AS total_gastos
